description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of dark and light paneling, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on one side, allowing for ample natural light. A spacious wooden deck extends from the front, furnished with outdoor seating and surrounded by a few trees and landscaped greenery. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved area adjacent to the deck, suggesting a driveway or patio. The rear and side facades are simpler, with fewer windows and a more solid appearance. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a wooden deck, and minimalist landscaping. The exterior combines dark and light panels for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, wooden deck with seating, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the light-colored wall, minimal windows, and the transition from deck to paved area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying expansive floor-to-ceiling windows and a simpler, solid facade with minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the dark facade, deck, and a partial view of the entryway and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, steps leading to a wooden deck, and no overhang or columns; minimalistic and open design.
